title: oxybaphus hirsutus
intro: Oxybaphus hirsutus, also known as hairy four o'clock, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Oxybaphus hirsutus include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
